name: The Law Office of Julia Kefalinos P.A.
description_short: Miami-based bankruptcy and criminal defense law firm led by Julia Kefalinos, offering Chapter 7, 11, and 13 bankruptcy filing, debt relief, and criminal defense services.
description_long:
The Law Office of Julia Kefalinos P.A. is a Miami-based legal practice founded by Julia Kefalinos, a bankruptcy and criminal defense attorney with over 30 years of experience serving clients throughout Miami-Dade and Broward counties in Florida. The firm positions itself as a client-focused alternative to larger law firms, emphasizing personalized representation and direct attorney access. Kefalinos is a multilingual attorney offering services in Spanish, Greek, German, and French. The firm's primary service offerings center on bankruptcy law and criminal defense. On the bankruptcy side, they handle Chapter 7, Chapter 11, and Chapter 13 filings, as well as related debt relief matters including student loan cases. The firm claims specific expertise in stopping foreclosures, wage garnishments, lawsuits, and creditor harassment. In criminal defense, they handle federal and state crimes, DUI/DWI, domestic violence, drug crimes, juvenile matters, traffic violations, and misdemeanors and felonies. The firm advertises availability for initial consultations via phone at 305-856-2713. Kefalinos distinguishes her practice through emphasis on communication and accessibility. The firm highlights preparation, negotiation, litigation capability, and knowledge of Miami courtrooms and prosecution strategies. Kefalinos has received media attention, including a CBS 4 interview regarding a high-profile DUI case, and maintains a website with client testimonials describing positive experiences and willingness to "go the extra mile."

As a law firm rather than a debt settlement or credit repair company, The Law Office of Julia Kefalinos operates within the legal services category. The practice is limited geographically to Florida and specifically emphasizes Miami-Dade and Broward county service areas. Like all bankruptcy attorneys, the firm's bankruptcy outcomes depend on individual client financial circumstances and the applicable bankruptcy code provisions at the time of filing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Over 30 years of bankruptcy and criminal defense experience
Multilingual services available (Spanish, Greek, German, French)
Direct client access to attorney via cell phone and email for consultations
Specific expertise in stopping foreclosures, wage garnishment, and creditor harassment
Handles all three primary bankruptcy chapters (7, 11, and 13)
Operates in high-volume court systems (Miami-Dade and Broward counties)
Media visibility and professional recognition (CBS 4 appearances)
cons: Services limited to Florida jurisdiction only; cannot serve clients outside the state
No information about fee structure, payment plans, or cost transparency on website
Limited online review data available; testimonials on site are not independently verified
Website does not specify bankruptcy filing success rates or average outcomes
Criminal defense and bankruptcy are separate practice areas with different expertise requirements
best_for: Miami-Dade and Broward County residents facing foreclosure or wage garnishment who seek immediate legal intervention
Multilingual Spanish, Greek, German, or French speakers needing bankruptcy representation in South Florida
Individuals requiring Chapter 7, 11, or 13 bankruptcy filing with preference for direct attorney access and personalized service
diagnosis: The Law Office of Julia Kefalinos P.A. is best for Miami-Dade and Broward County residents facing bankruptcy, overwhelming debt, foreclosure, or wage garnishment who prioritize direct attorney access and personalized service. The main caveat is that services are geographically limited to Florida, fee structure is not disclosed online, and the firm combines bankruptcy and criminal defense practices under one attorney rather than specializing exclusively in debt relief.
services: Student loan and debt relief consultation
Criminal defense representation (federal and state crimes)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: Miami bankruptcy and criminal defense law firm offering Chapter 7, 11, and 13 filings and debt relief.
